# anypoint_private_space_transit_gateways (Data Source)

Lists transit gateway attachments on a private space.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anypoint_private_space_transit_gateways" "all" {
  org_id           = var.root_org
  private_space_id = "7f747999-a9bb-41d5-bfe8-d6b8cca68c62"
}

output "tgw_ids" {
  value = [for t in data.anypoint_private_space_transit_gateways.all.transit_gateways : t.transit_gateway_id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String)
- `private_space_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `transit_gateways` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--transit_gateways))

<a id="nestedatt--transit_gateways"></a>
### Nested Schema for `transit_gateways`

Read-Only:

- `account_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `resource_share_account` (String)
- `resource_share_id` (String)
- `routes` (List of String)
- `space_name` (String)
- `status_attachment` (String)
- `status_gateway` (String)
- `tgw_resource_url` (String)
- `transit_gateway_id` (String)
